text.message: lol ruined the plow I wanted to take that 9-10 and plow right to the 6 🤣
Orange and green are flush with ore
Can’t trade you a city so cheap
These trades are absurd lol such cheapmcitird
orange close to road and army
I was going to rob orange but now it’s you
Hate when ppl tell me how to rob
Not into trading ppl the win.
Yup that’s why I didn’t want to give you road bc it completely cuts me off and makes me lose
if i dont keep road orange wins
I only care about me winning
If you ain’t first ur last
But me giving you road instead of me taking it myself doesn’t help me
i even left u the 4-9-2 spot
